data.body:
AC amendment (GAP-001): Triage results are in ca06-e969's ticket comments as a structured classification table. Run .claude/scripts/dso ticket show ca06-e969 and parse the classification from the most recent substantive comment. Filter for files with classification=replace.

AC amendment (GAP-003): Replacement test files MUST use distinct filenames from originals. Use naming convention: test_<name>_behavioral.py. Do NOT overwrite original files — originals are deleted by a separate cleanup task.
